response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, seasoned engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, and he meets the baseline bar on degree, years of experience, and language breadth. However, this is a Principal (IC6) role centered on experimentation and growth systems, and the resume shows no experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis workflows. There is also little evidence of Principal-level scope such as leading multi-team, multi-workstream initiatives or building platforms adopted across many teams; his trajectory reads as strong senior/staff-level product and platform engineering. The domain and seniority gaps outweigh the solid general engineering foundation for this particular role.
strengths: 15+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Production experience at scale, including low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) aligning with the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation frameworks, A/B testing, feature flighting, or growth measurement — the core of this role
No evidence of Principal-level scope: leading multi-team initiatives, org-wide architecture, or platforms adopted across multiple teams
No visible background in metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical/experimental analysis

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering foundation with high-scale production experience
